title: Solar PV Monitor
description: Residential solar PV monitoring - 5.24 kWp system with 2 micro inverters and 8 panels

panels.title: Solar Power
panels.description: Current total solar production from both inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS solar_kw FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS solar_kw FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Today's Energy
panels.description: Total energy produced today from both inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT (MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor)) AS today_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

SELECT (MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor)) AS today_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: Lifetime Energy
panels.description: Total cumulative energy produced since system installation

targets.rawSql: SELECT (MAX(total_production_1_sensor) + MAX(total_production_2_sensor) + MAX(total_production_3_sensor) + MAX(total_production_4_sensor)) AS lifetime_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

SELECT (MAX(total_production_1_sensor) + MAX(total_production_2_sensor) + MAX(total_production_3_sensor) + MAX(total_production_4_sensor)) AS lifetime_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

panels.title: Grid Import
panels.description: Current power drawn from the grid via smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS grid_kw FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: House Load
panels.description: Current household power consumption (solar + grid import)

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS east_kw FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS west_kw FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS grid_kw FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Self-Consumption
panels.description: Percentage of house load covered by solar production

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor AS east_w FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor AS west_w FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor AS grid_w FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Peak Today
panels.description: Maximum solar power achieved today

targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX(power_sensor) / 1000.0 AS peak_kw FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
SELECT MAX(power_sensor) / 1000.0 AS peak_kw FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'

panels.title: System Status
panels.description: Current inverter operating state

targets.rawSql: SELECT device_state_sensor AS state FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 minute' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: ☀ Solar → House
panels.description: Solar power flowing into the house

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS solar_kw FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS solar_kw FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: 🏠 House Load
panels.description: Total household power consumption

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS east_kw FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS west_kw FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS grid_kw FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: ⚡ Grid → House
panels.description: Power drawn from the electrical grid

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor / 1000.0 AS grid_kw FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Solar Production
panels.description: Power output over time — East (orange) vs West (blue) inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Inverter Power
panels.description: Current power output per inverter

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_sensor AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT power_sensor AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: East / West Split
panels.description: Today's energy production split between East and West inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 day'

SELECT MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 day'

panels.title: Daily Energy
panels.description: Daily energy production — East (orange) vs West (blue)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', time) AS time, MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', time) AS time, MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Production Heatmap
panels.description: Hourly production intensity over time. Color shows total system power (kW). Select Last 90 days for best view.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS "East kW" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS "West kW" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Panel Power
panels.description: Current power output per solar panel — 8 panels across 2 inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV1" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV2" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV3" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV4" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV1" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV2" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV3" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV4" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Module Detail
panels.description: Per-panel metrics — power, voltage, current, today's and total energy production

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  'East PV1' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv1_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv1_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_1_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_1_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  'East PV2' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv2_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv2_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_2_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_2_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  'East PV3' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv3_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv3_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_3_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_3_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  'East PV4' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv4_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv4_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_4_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_4_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  'West PV1' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv1_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv1_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_1_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_1_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  'West PV2' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv2_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv2_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_2_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_2_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  'West PV3' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv3_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv3_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_3_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_3_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  'West PV4' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(pv4_voltage_sensor, 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(pv4_current_sensor, 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(today_production_4_sensor, 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(total_production_4_sensor, 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Roof Layout
panels.description: Physical panel positions on roof with color-coded production heatmap. West slope on top, East slope on bottom.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV1" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV2" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV3" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0) AS "East PV4" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV1" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV2" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV3" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0) AS "West PV4" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Grid Voltage
panels.description: Current grid voltage from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT voltage_sensor AS voltage FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Grid Frequency
panels.description: Current grid frequency from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT frequency_sensor AS frequency FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Power Factor
panels.description: Current power factor from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT power_factor_sensor AS pf FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Grid Current
panels.description: Current grid current from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT current_sensor AS current FROM "Smart Meter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Voltage & Frequency
panels.description: Grid voltage and frequency trends over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(voltage_sensor) AS "Voltage" FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(frequency_sensor) AS "Frequency" FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Power Factor & Current
panels.description: Grid power factor and current trends over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_factor_sensor) AS "Power Factor" FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(current_sensor) AS "Current" FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: East Temperature
panels.description: East Microinverter operating temperature

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(temperature_sensor, 0) AS "Temperature" FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: West Temperature
panels.description: West Microinverter operating temperature

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(temperature_sensor, 0) AS "Temperature" FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: East State
panels.description: East Microinverter operating state

targets.rawSql: SELECT device_state_sensor AS state FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: East Alarm
panels.description: East Microinverter alarm status

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(alarm_sensor, 0) AS alarm FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: East Fault
panels.description: East Microinverter fault status

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(fault_sensor, 0) AS fault FROM "East Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: West State
panels.description: West Microinverter operating state

targets.rawSql: SELECT device_state_sensor AS state FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: West Alarm
panels.description: West Microinverter alarm status

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(alarm_sensor, 0) AS alarm FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: West Fault
panels.description: West Microinverter fault status

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(fault_sensor, 0) AS fault FROM "West Microinverter" ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Inverter State History
panels.description: Operating state transitions over time — producing, standby, offline

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, device_state_sensor AS "East Inverter"
FROM "East Microinverter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
ORDER BY time

SELECT time, device_state_sensor AS "West Inverter"
FROM "West Microinverter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Today's Savings
panels.description: Estimated savings from solar production today, calculated using TOU rates (Peak: 5.7982, Off-Peak: 2.6369 THB/kWh)

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') IN (0, 6) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 2 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 26 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 4 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (6, 13, 14, 15) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 5 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (1, 4, 12) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 6 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 7 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 28 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 8 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 10 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (13, 23) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (5, 10, 31) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') < 22 THEN hourly_kwh * 5.7982 ELSE hourly_kwh * 2.6369 END) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') IN (0, 6) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 2 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 26 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 4 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (6, 13, 14, 15) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 5 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (1, 4, 12) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 6 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 7 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 28 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 8 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 10 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (13, 23) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (5, 10, 31) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') < 22 THEN hourly_kwh * 5.7982 ELSE hourly_kwh * 2.6369 END) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

panels.title: Month Savings
panels.description: Month-to-date estimated savings from solar production using TOU rates

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') IN (0, 6) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 2 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 26 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 4 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (6, 13, 14, 15) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 5 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (1, 4, 12) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 6 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 7 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 28 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 8 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 10 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (13, 23) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (5, 10, 31) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') < 22 THEN hourly_kwh * 5.7982 ELSE hourly_kwh * 2.6369 END) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('month', now()) GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') IN (0, 6) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 2 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 26 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 4 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (6, 13, 14, 15) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 5 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (1, 4, 12) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 6 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 7 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 28 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 8 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 10 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (13, 23) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (5, 10, 31) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') < 22 THEN hourly_kwh * 5.7982 ELSE hourly_kwh * 2.6369 END) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('month', now()) GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

panels.description: Year-to-date estimated savings from solar production using TOU rates

INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 2 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 26 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 4 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 7 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 28 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 8 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT hourly_kwh * 5.7982 ELSE hourly_kwh * 2.6369 END) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('year', now()) GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') IN (0, 6) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 1 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 2 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (6, 13, 14, 15) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 5 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (1, 4, 12) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 6 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 7 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 28 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 8 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 10 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (13, 23) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN CAST(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) = 12 AND CAST(EXTRACT(DAY FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') AS INTEGER) IN (5, 10, 31) THEN hourly_kwh * 2.6369 WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM bucket AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Bangkok') < 22 THEN hourly_kwh * 5.7982 ELSE hourly_kwh * COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('year', now()) GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

panels.title: Today's Backfeed Count
panels.description: Number of grid backfeed events today (Smart Meter power < 0)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM "Smart Meter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND power_sensor < 0

panels.title: Max Backfeed Power
panels.description: Maximum grid backfeed power today (absolute value)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ABS(MIN(power_sensor)) AS "Max Export"
FROM "Smart Meter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND power_sensor < 0

panels.title: Grid Backfeed Log
panels.description: Instances where grid power went negative (export/backfeed)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "Time",
  ABS(power_sensor) AS "Export Power (W)",
  voltage_sensor AS "Voltage (V)",
  current_sensor AS "Current (A)"
FROM "Smart Meter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
  AND power_sensor < 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Alarm / Fault History
panels.description: Historical inverter alarm and fault events

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "Time",
  'East' AS "Inverter",
  CASE
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 AND fault_sensor != 0 THEN 'Alarm + Fault'
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 THEN 'Alarm'
    WHEN fault_sensor != 0 THEN 'Fault'
    ELSE 'State Change'
  END AS "Type",
  COALESCE(alarm_sensor, 0) AS "Alarm Code",
  COALESCE(fault_sensor, 0) AS "Fault Code",
  device_state_sensor AS "State"
FROM "East Microinverter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
  AND (alarm_sensor != 0 OR fault_sensor != 0)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  time AS "Time",
  'West' AS "Inverter",
  CASE
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 AND fault_sensor != 0 THEN 'Alarm + Fault'
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 THEN 'Alarm'
    WHEN fault_sensor != 0 THEN 'Fault'
    ELSE 'State Change'
  END AS "Type",
  COALESCE(alarm_sensor, 0) AS "Alarm Code",
  COALESCE(fault_sensor, 0) AS "Fault Code",
  device_state_sensor AS "State"
FROM "West Microinverter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
  AND (alarm_sensor != 0 OR fault_sensor != 0)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Event Log
panels.description: All system events — grid backfeed, inverter alarms, faults, and state changes

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "Time",
  'Smart Meter' AS "Source",
  'Backfeed' AS "Event",
  ABS(power_sensor) AS "Detail"
FROM "Smart Meter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
  AND power_sensor < 0
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  time AS "Time",
  'East Inverter' AS "Source",
  CASE
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 THEN 'Alarm'
    WHEN fault_sensor != 0 THEN 'Fault'
    ELSE 'State Change'
  END AS "Event",
  CASE
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 THEN alarm_sensor
    WHEN fault_sensor != 0 THEN fault_sensor
    ELSE device_state_sensor
  END AS "Detail"
FROM "East Microinverter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
  AND (alarm_sensor != 0 OR fault_sensor != 0 OR device_state_sensor != 2)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 50

SELECT
  time AS "Time",
  'West Inverter' AS "Source",
  CASE
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 THEN 'Alarm'
    WHEN fault_sensor != 0 THEN 'Fault'
    ELSE 'State Change'
  END AS "Event",
  CASE
    WHEN alarm_sensor != 0 THEN alarm_sensor
    WHEN fault_sensor != 0 THEN fault_sensor
    ELSE device_state_sensor
  END AS "Detail"
FROM "West Microinverter"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
  AND (alarm_sensor != 0 OR fault_sensor != 0 OR device_state_sensor != 2)
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 50
